title: Being able to move all types of boards between workspaces
excerpt:
At the moment it seems that certain types of boards e.g. Sales CRM template boards can’t be moved to other workspaces. (not sure if this is it for all templates). 
This is very frustrating as during the development of a …

posts.author: oliverjoonatan (Oliver Hotakainen)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the moment it seems that certain types of boards e.g. Sales CRM template boards can’t be moved to other workspaces. (not sure if this is it for all templates).

This is very frustrating as during the development of a work process we might try different stuff to get the workspace working as intended. This means that at the end of the process we notice that certain boards etc. don’t belong to a specific workspace but would suit better into another or its own altogether.

TL;DR: Make it so that admins can move any board to any workspace without restrictions.

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Oliver (@oliverjoonatan),

Arun here from Decadis AG – monday marketplace partner. We’ve listened closely to the challenges faced by customers like you, and built a solution that’s truly a game-changer. Meet Batch Hero for monday, your superhero for bulk operations and board management.

Looking at your use case, we believe our app is a perfect fit. You can move boards between workspaces or folders with just a few clicks. Let me show you how,

And the best part? The app is still free!

Give it a try and see it for yourself. If you have further questions or would like to discuss your use cases, kindly reach out to us.

Best,
Arun
